conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention volume independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: At a solvent oxide) composition of THF/hexane = 71:29% by weight, 2 0 = 514 nm = 514 nm in the retention volume does not change with molar mass.
conditions.notes: Critical condition established for PEO-MA macromonomers to analyze polystyrene-graft-poly(ethylene oxide) copolymers.
conditions.physical_address: Polymer Institute, Slovak Academy of Sciences, Dubravska cesta 9, 842 36 Bratislava, Slovakia

conditions.evidence_text: The critical diagram of molar mass vs retention scattering volume for PEO-MA macromonomers is shown in Fig. 1. At hexane concentrations less than 29% by weight in the solvent mixture the retention volume decreases as the molar mass increases. The reverse behaviour is observed at hexane concentrations higher than 29% by weight, where retention volume increases with increasing molar mass. At a solvent oxide) composition of THF/hexane = 71:29% by weight, 2 0 = 514 nm = 514 nm in the retention volume does not change with molar mass.
conditions.notes: Critical condition established for polystyrene-graft-poly(ethylene oxide) copolymers using PEO-MA macromonomers.
conditions.physical_address: Polymer Institute, Slovak Academy of Sciences, Du´ bravska´ cesta 9, 842 36 Bratislava, Slovakia
